title: Ranunculastrum bulbiferum
taxonomy: Ranunculastrum bulbiferum is a species of flowering plant. It belongs to the family Ranunculaceae and is native to the Mediterranean region. The classification of Ranunculastrum bulbiferum includes its kingdom as Plantae, its phylum as Magnoliophyta, and its class as Magnoliopsida. Further, its order is Ranunculales and its family is Ranunculaceae, as mentioned earlier. The species also has a binomial nomenclature of Ranunculastrum bulbiferum.
